findings.summary: FrontierTests::FFleetTest::testDecTransitTime is flaky/order-and-RNG-dependent (FFleet::decTransitTime() uses irand(100) > getRJChance() with a time-seeded RNG). Observed 1 failure across 3 fresh full-suite runs during this verification, unrelated to any CRIT-1 change (FFleetTest.cpp/FFleet.cpp are outside the CRIT-1 diff surface). Not blocking; noted for a possible separate follow-up.
